OverviewDemo.Title: Showcase Notes
OverviewDemo.Description: The main window keeps only control entries; theme and language can be switched from the title bar.
OverviewDemo.ControlSamplesDesc: Transfer, VComboBox, TabControl, StatusBadge, StatusCard, and AnimatedImage.
OverviewDemo.MarkupExtensionsDesc: If, Switch, and common converter samples are grouped on the MarkupExtensions page.
OverviewDemo.WindowSamplesDesc: The Window page shows native Window, UrsaWindow, and CodeWFWindow title bars, shaped windows, and multiple title heights.
OverviewDemo.ThemeI18nDesc: All pages use JSON language resources and dynamic theme resources to verify controls in light and dark modes.

TransferDemo.Title: Transfer Workspace
TransferDemo.Description: Move items between source and target lists, edit both headers, and review the selected result summary.
TransferDemo.Item01: Keep compatibility with the last free Avalonia DataGrid version
TransferDemo.Item02: Add interaction demos for dense data scenarios
TransferDemo.Item03: Support localized UI notes in the open-source repository
TransferDemo.Item04: Unify the visual style of regular samples
TransferDemo.Item05: Publish separate artifacts by runtime platform
TransferDemo.Item06: Improve the DataGrid tri-state sorting extension
TransferDemo.Item07: Fix trapezoid tab border rendering details
TransferDemo.Item08: Improve readability for window shell examples
TransferDemo.Item09: Host scrollable content through the built-in Grid ScrollViewer
TransferDemo.Item10: Show Transfer styling under the Semi theme
TransferDemo.Item12: Strengthen publish scripts for multi-project output
TransferDemo.Item13: Ensure horizontal scrolling content renders correctly
TransferDemo.Item14: Provide a large-data stress scenario in the DataGrid sample
TransferDemo.Item15: Align window title and caption button foreground colors

VComboBoxDemo.Title: VComboBox and Icon Actions
VComboBoxDemo.Description: Demonstrates compact icon commands, inline confirmation, and a vertical selector layout for alert filters.
VComboBoxDemo.Scenario1: Works well for alert type selection and compact command bars.
VComboBoxDemo.Scenario2: Fits toolbar controls where icons sit above labels.
VComboBoxDemo.Scenario3: Supports pop-up edit flows that need an extra confirmation step.

TabControlDemo.Title: TabControl Themes
TabControlDemo.Description: Two tab styles are built from the same custom theme: one balanced and business-like, the other more brand-forward.

StatusBadgeDemo.Title: StatusBadge Component
StatusBadgeDemo.SemanticDesc: Five standard severity levels for dashboards, process tables, and compact monitoring views.
StatusBadgeDemo.SizeDesc: Adjust font sizes for different data densities, from compact tables to emphasized status zones.
StatusBadgeDemo.ContentDesc: Long left and right labels remain readable for metric values or category notes.
StatusBadgeDemo.AppearanceDesc: Tune corner radius and padding to create square, rounded, or pill badges for different product languages.
StatusBadgeDemo.ScenariosDesc: The examples below show badges in metrics, system status, and task tracking views.

StatusCardDemo.Title: StatusCard
StatusCardDemo.Description: A compact card format for health, alert, and service status. The examples show multiple severities and densities.
StatusCardDemo.Usage1: Use cards when status information needs more visual weight than lightweight badges or labels.
StatusCardDemo.Usage2: Useful for dashboards, service overviews, cluster nodes, and health panels.
StatusCardDemo.Usage3: Larger icon and typography combinations fit alert states and monitoring screens.

MarkupExtensionsDemo.Title: MarkupExtensions
MarkupExtensionsDemo.Description: Migrated from AvaloniaExtensions.Axaml with an added Switch markup: express conditional text, status mapping, and collection state in concise XAML.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.PipelinePaused: The pipeline has paused job intake
MarkupExtensionsDemo.AutoPublishEnabledDesc: New jobs enter the release queue immediately.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.AutoPublishPausedDesc: The queue is retained but will not consume more jobs.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.QueueNotEmpty: The queue still contains release jobs
MarkupExtensionsDemo.SwitchSourceDesc: RadioButton writes an enum through EnumToBooleanConverter, and the status card maps text and colors through Switch.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.HealthHealthyDesc: All checks passed and automated publishing can continue.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.HealthDelayedDesc: Upstream jobs are still queued and should recover shortly.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.HealthFailedDesc: The latest build failed and needs a fix first.
MarkupExtensionsDemo.HealthLockedDesc: The on-call owner has taken over and automation is temporarily stopped.

AnimatedImageDemo.Title: AnimatedImage GIF
AnimatedImageDemo.Description: The same nice.gif resource is loaded through an Avalonia resource URI and a network URI.
AnimatedImageDemo.NetworkFallback: Network GIF failed to load. Showing local GIF instead.

WindowDemo.Title: Window and Title Bar Styles
WindowDemo.Description: Compare native Window, UrsaWindow, and CodeWFWindow through several independent title bar styles.
WindowDemo.NativeDesc: The platform title bar and caption buttons are the baseline for custom shells.
WindowDemo.UrsaDesc: Default, borderless, different title heights, and shaped Ursa shells.
WindowDemo.CodeWFDesc: Managed title bar, title slots, custom colors, and shaped CodeWFWindow samples.

WindowDemos.NativeDescription: The default platform window is the baseline before comparing Ursa and CodeWF custom shells.
WindowDemos.UrsaDefaultDescription: Keeps the default Ursa title bar and caption buttons as a baseline for borderless, custom, and shaped variants.
WindowDemos.UrsaNoneDescription: System borders are removed; the client area provides its own top bar and action area.
WindowDemos.UrsaMoveDescription: The custom top bar starts move drag and keeps clear content margins so the title bar does not overlap the client area.
WindowDemos.UrsaDarkDescription: Title bar slots host branding, status, and secondary context for monitoring consoles, IDE shells, and operations tools.
WindowDemos.UrsaCompactDescription: Fixed size, lightweight title content, and a small command surface fit settings panels, property panes, and command palettes.
WindowDemos.UrsaTallDescription: A taller title area can hold subtitle text, environment tags, and status badges while the client area begins below it.
WindowDemos.UrsaShapeDescription: A transparent window and custom circular container demonstrate a true shaped shell for splash screens, prompts, and branded tools.
WindowDemos.UrsaStarDescription: A star-shaped window demonstrates non-rectangular boundaries, a transparent outer layer, and shape-region dragging.
WindowDemos.UrsaBlobDescription: A freeform outline demonstrates a more unusual window silhouette on a transparent background.
WindowDemos.CodeWFStandardDescription: CodeWFWindow draws the title bar, caption buttons, and resize hot zones from its own template for consistent layout.
WindowDemos.CodeWFDarkDescription: The title bar uses a dark background, light caption buttons, and a right-side status slot for operations and developer tools.
WindowDemos.CodeWFAccentDescription: Title bar background, foreground, border, and right slot are configured directly from XAML.
WindowDemos.CodeWFCompactDescription: A low title bar and fixed window size fit tool panes, import wizards, and configuration editors.
WindowDemos.CodeWFTallDescription: Shows logo, subtitle, status area, and larger hit targets without overlapping the content region.
WindowDemos.CodeWFShapeDescription: Hides the regular title bar and uses a transparent outer window with a custom circular body.
WindowDemos.CodeWFStarDescription: Combines the CodeWFWindow base shell with star-region clipping for a non-rectangular window.
WindowDemos.CodeWFBlobDescription: Uses a freeform outline and transparent outer layer to demonstrate a more complex shaped CodeWFWindow.
WindowDemos.TitleBarContentDesc: The left side shows product identity, the right side shows status, and caption buttons remain owned by the base window.
WindowDemos.ScenarioDesc: Fits apps that need an immersive look without hand-writing all caption button behavior.
WindowDemos.FixedSizeDesc: CanResize=false makes the window behave like a fixed tool panel.
WindowDemos.LightTitleBarDesc: The title bar keeps only an icon and short title to reduce visual weight.
WindowDemos.TitleBarBrushes: Title bar background, foreground, and border
WindowDemos.DoubleClickMaximize: Double-click the title bar to maximize or restore
WindowDemos.ResizeHotZones: Edge hot zones support drag resizing
